---
title: "NEM Generation Dashboard"
comments: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

<script>
  // Redirect to the Panel dashboard served via Cloudflare reverse proxy
  window.location.href = "https://nemgen.itkservices2.com";
</script>

<noscript>
  <p>Redirecting to the <a href="https://nemgen.itkservices2.com">NEM Generation Dashboard</a>...</p>
</noscript>
